# dcc-mcp-core

> Foundational library for the DCC Model Context Protocol (MCP) ecosystem. Provides action management, structured results, middleware, event system, skills/script registration, and MCP protocol adapters for Digital Content Creation applications (Maya, Blender, Houdini, etc.).

## Quick Start

```python
from dcc_mcp_core import create_action_manager

manager = create_action_manager("maya")
result = manager.call_action("create_sphere", radius=2.0)
print(result.success, result.message, result.context)
```

## Installation

- PyPI: `pip install dcc-mcp-core`
- Source: `git clone https://github.com/loonghao/dcc-mcp-core.git && pip install -e .`
- Python: >=3.7 (CI tests 3.11+)
- License: MIT

## Core Concepts

- **Action**: Class-based operation with Pydantic InputModel/OutputModel, validated parameters, structured results
- **ActionManager**: Lifecycle manager for Actions — discover, load, execute with middleware and events
- **ActionRegistry**: Singleton registry for Action class discovery and retrieval
- **ActionResultModel**: Standardized Pydantic model for all action results (success, message, prompt, error, context)
- **Middleware**: Chain-of-responsibility pattern for cross-cutting concerns (logging, performance)
- **EventBus**: Publish/subscribe system for action lifecycle events
- **Skills**: Zero-code script registration (Python, MEL, MaxScript, BAT, Shell) as MCP tools via SKILL.md
- **MCP Protocols**: Abstract base classes and adapters for MCP Server, Tools, Resources, Prompts

## Key APIs

### Top-level exports (`dcc_mcp_core`)
- `create_action_manager(dcc_name, ...) -> ActionManager`
- `get_action_manager(dcc_name, ...) -> ActionManager` (cached singleton)
- `ActionResultModel` — Pydantic model: success, message, prompt, error, context
- `success_result(message, prompt=None, **context) -> ActionResultModel`
- `error_result(message, error, prompt=None, **context) -> ActionResultModel`
- `from_exception(e, message=None, ...) -> ActionResultModel`

### Actions (`dcc_mcp_core.actions`)
- `Action` — base class; subclass and implement `_execute()`
- `Action.InputModel` / `Action.OutputModel` — Pydantic models for validation
- `ActionManager.call_action(name, **kwargs) -> ActionResultModel`
- `ActionManager.call_action_async(name, **kwargs) -> ActionResultModel`
- `ActionManager.get_actions_info() -> ActionResultModel`
- `ActionRegistry.register(action_class) -> bool`
- `ActionRegistry.get_action(name, dcc_name=None) -> Optional[Type[Action]]`
- `ActionRegistry.list_actions(dcc_name=None) -> List[Dict]`
- `create_function_adapter(action_name, ...) -> Callable`
- `create_function_adapters(dcc_name=None, ...) -> Dict[str, Callable]`

### Middleware (`dcc_mcp_core.actions.middleware`)
- `Middleware` — base class with `process(action) -> ActionResultModel`
- `LoggingMiddleware` — logs execution details and timing
- `PerformanceMiddleware(threshold=1.0)` — warns on slow actions
- `MiddlewareChain.add(cls).build() -> Middleware`

### Skills (`dcc_mcp_core.skills`)
- `SkillScanner.scan(extra_paths=None, dcc_name=None) -> List[str]`
- `parse_skill_md(skill_dir) -> Optional[SkillMetadata]`
- `load_skill(skill_dir, registry=None, dcc_name=None) -> List[Type[Action]]`
- `create_script_action(skill_name, script_path, metadata, dcc_name) -> Type[Action]`
- Environment variable: `DCC_MCP_SKILL_PATHS`

### MCP Protocols (`dcc_mcp_core.protocols`)
- `MCPAdapter.action_to_tool(action_class) -> ToolDefinition`
- `MCPAdapter.resource_to_definition(resource_class) -> ResourceDefinition`
- `MCPAdapter.prompt_to_definition(prompt_class) -> PromptDefinition`
- `MCPServerProtocol` — full MCP server interface (Tools + Resources + Prompts)
- `Resource(ABC)` — abstract base for MCP Resources; implement `read(**params) -> str`
- `Prompt(ABC)` — abstract base for MCP Prompts; implement `render(**kwargs) -> str`

### Utils (`dcc_mcp_core.utils`)
- `load_module_from_path(file_path, dependencies=None, dcc_name=None) -> ModuleType`
- `inject_dependencies(module, dependencies, inject_core_modules=False, dcc_name=None)`
- `@error_handler` — decorator: wraps return in ActionResultModel, catches exceptions
- `@with_context()` — decorator: ensures context parameter exists
- Type wrappers for RPyC: `BooleanWrapper`, `IntWrapper`, `FloatWrapper`, `StringWrapper`
- `unwrap_parameters(params) -> Dict` / `unwrap_value(value) -> Any`

## Documentation

- [README (English)](https://github.com/loonghao/dcc-mcp-core/blob/main/README.md)

- [Full API Reference](https://github.com/loonghao/dcc-mcp-core/blob/main/llms-full.txt)

## Project Structure

```
dcc_mcp_core/
├── __init__.py              # Public API exports
├── models.py                # ActionResultModel, SkillMetadata
├── actions/
│   ├── base.py              # Action base class (InputModel/OutputModel)
│   ├── manager.py           # ActionManager, create/get_action_manager
│   ├── registry.py          # ActionRegistry (singleton)
│   ├── middleware.py         # Middleware, LoggingMiddleware, PerformanceMiddleware
│   ├── events.py            # EventBus (global event_bus instance)
│   ├── function_adapter.py  # Action-to-function adapters
│   └── generator.py         # Action template generation
├── skills/
│   ├── scanner.py           # SkillScanner
│   ├── loader.py            # parse_skill_md, load_skill
│   └── script_action.py     # create_script_action factory
├── protocols/
│   ├── types.py             # ToolDefinition, ResourceDefinition, PromptDefinition
│   ├── base.py              # Resource(ABC), Prompt(ABC)
│   ├── server.py            # MCPServerProtocol, MCPToolsProtocol
│   └── adapter.py           # MCPAdapter
└── utils/
    ├── filesystem.py         # Platform dirs, env path helpers
    ├── module_loader.py      # Dynamic module loading
    ├── decorators.py         # error_handler, with_context
    ├── dependency_injector.py # inject_dependencies
    ├── template.py           # Jinja2 template rendering
    ├── type_wrappers.py      # RPyC-safe type wrappers
    └── result_factory.py     # success_result, error_result, from_exception
```

## Development

- Tool manager: [vx](https://github.com/loonghao/vx)
- Build: Poetry (poetry-core backend), `vx uv build`
- Test: `vx just test` (nox + pytest + coverage)
- Lint: `vx just lint` (ruff + isort), fix: `vx just lint-fix`
- Release: [Release Please](https://github.com/googleapis/release-please) with Conventional Commits
- CI: GitHub Actions (3 OS x 3 Python versions)

## Related Projects

- [dcc-mcp-rpyc](https://github.com/loonghao/dcc-mcp-rpyc) — RPyC bridge for remote DCC operations
- [dcc-mcp-maya](https://github.com/loonghao/dcc-mcp-maya) — Maya MCP server implementation
